subject: Re: Template matching issue
body:
Hey Laina,
Your image hasn’t come through so hard to tell what’s going on but a few questions I would ask myself
- are my tilt series aligned well (are features in tomograms “crispy”) 
- is my orientation sampling high enough?
- is my template good? 
I would also look directly at the cc volumes to see whether it is a problem with the matching process or just the peak picking on top of that :-) 
Good luck!
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Oct 20, 2025, at 11:44, 'Laina Nicole Hall' via Warp <warp-em@googlegroups.com> wrote:
﻿
Hi Warp team,
I have been running template matching on some yeast tomograms and am not getting any picks above lowest threshold (3). Most picks have scores of rlnAutopickFigureOfMerit ~1.5.
I have tried:
different templates
different pixel size (10, 20 A)
whitening or no whitening
low pass filtering 
Any suggestions? Could this be an error somewhere in tomogram reconstruction?
Thanks in advance,
Laina
